entities.patient: a boy sitting on the exam table

scenes.title: The Doctor's Office
scenes.background_prompt: A pediatric doctor's office with an exam table, a wall poster of the human body, a desk with a computer, and a jar of lollipops. No people.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A pediatric doctor's office with bright walls decorated with cartoon animal stickers. A doctor in a white coat with a stethoscope draped around his neck sits on a rolling stool, holding a clipboard and speaking to his patient with an encouraging expression, mouth open mid-explanation, one hand making a reassuring gesture. On the exam table covered in crinkly white paper, a boy of about seven in a t-shirt and shorts sits with his legs dangling over the edge, looking at the doctor with a slightly nervous expression. A colorful wall poster showing the human skeletal system hangs behind them. On the doctor's desk, a computer monitor shows a medical chart. A glass jar filled with colorful lollipops sits on the counter next to a box of latex gloves — a promised reward for bravery.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place doctor on a rolling stool, sitting and holding a clipboard, speaking with encouraging expression, mouth open, one hand making a reassuring gesture. Place patient on the exam table, sitting with legs dangling, looking at the doctor with slightly nervous expression.
